name: subhaan0804-portfolio
description: Subhaan Shaikh portfolio — vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, GitHub Pages

scripts.minify:css: npx csso assets/css/main.css -o assets/css/main.min.css && npx csso assets/css/components.css -o assets/css/components.min.css && npx csso assets/css/animations.css -o assets/css/animations.min.css
scripts.minify:js: npx terser assets/js/icons.js -o assets/js/icons.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser assets/js/renderer.js -o assets/js/renderer.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser assets/js/animations.js -o assets/js/animations.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser assets/js/main.js -o assets/js/main.min.js --compress --mangle
scripts.build: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
scripts.images:webp: for f in assets/images/*.jpg assets/images/*.png; do ffmpeg -i "$f" -c:v libwebp -q:v 80 "${f%.*}.webp" -y; done
